prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约30970名→32951名→42594名→50519名→41571名。2021至2024年呈持续后移趋势（位次数字增大），2024年达到峰值50519名后，2025年大幅反弹至41571名，回升约8948名，显示2024年存在异常低位，2025年已明显回暖；该校在山东省招生计划：2021年262人、2022年262人、2023年252人、2024年256人、2025年263人；2026年计划276人，较2025年增加13人，扩招约4.94%，招生名额增加对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在84–92名区间（2026年约第89名），属中上游211层次；该校在近年声誉监测中未出现显著负面或正面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总排名第83位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏下水平，未出现报考热度异常信号；第五轮学科评估中，交通运输工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通运输、交通工程等招生专业高度关联，体现行业特色优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以交通、土木、机械、材料等传统工科为主。2024年专业热度数据显示：土木建筑为"分化观望"、机械/智能制造为"分化观望"、材料类仍属"明显劝退"；而计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等热门专业热度持续偏高。山东省考生总数持续增长：2021年约54.4万→2025年约68.1万→2026年约72万（较2025年增约5.7%）；长安大学位于陕西西安，非山东省内高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在山东省招生人数约占其全国总计划的较大比例（2025年山东计划263人），属该校重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至41571名的回暖趋势、2026年扩招约4.94%对竞争的缓解、以及山东省考生总数持续增长约5.7%带来的竞争加剧，两因素对冲后竞争略增。同时该校传统工科专业（土木、机械、材料）社会热度偏低，而热门专业（计算机、电气、电子信息）招生名额有限，整体报考吸引力平稳。预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移，预测约43004名，区间42504–43504名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约43004名，区间42504–43504名。位次在区间下限（42504名）以内者可重点冲刺一档专业（计算机、电气、法学、电子信息类）；位次在区间中段（约43000名）建议以二档专业为主（交通运输、车辆工程、自动化类、数学类），兼顾长安大学王牌交通类专业；位次在区间上限（43504名）附近或以外，建议以三档专业保底（土木类、材料类、水利类、安全工程），同时可关注二档中位次要求相对较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 30970 → 32951 → 42594 → 50519 → 41571. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend (increasing ranking numbers), reaching a peak of 50519 in 2024, then rebounding significantly to 41571 in 2025, a recovery of about 8948 places, indicating an abnormal low in 2024 and a clear recovery in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong Province: 262 in 2021, 262 in 2022, 252 in 2023, 256 in 2024, 263 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 276, an increase of 13 from 2025, an expansion of about 4.94%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable in the 84–92 range in recent years (approximately 89th in 2026), placing it in the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities. In recent reputation monitoring, no significant negative or positive public opinion events have been observed. The university's Douyin popularity overall ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', indicating below-average attention on short video platforms, with no abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Transportation Engineering was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, highly correlated with enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Transportation, and Traffic Engineering, reflecting industry-specific advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are mainly traditional engineering fields such as transportation, civil engineering, mechanical engineering, and materials. 2024 major popularity data shows: Civil Engineering and Architecture is 'differentiated and wait-and-see', Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing is 'differentiated and wait-and-see', Materials is still 'clearly discouraged'; while popular majors like Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication continue to have high popularity. The total number of candidates in Shandong Province continues to grow: approximately 544,000 in 2021 → 681,000 in 2025 → 720,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 5.7% from 2025). Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a university within Shandong Province, with no local enrollment bias. The university's enrollment in Shandong Province accounts for a relatively large proportion of its total national plan (263 in Shandong in 2025), making it an important source province for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant recovery trend of the 2025 ranking to 41571, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 4.94% easing competition, and the continuous increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% intensifying competition, the two factors offset each other, resulting in a slight increase in competition. At the same time, the university's traditional engineering majors (civil, mechanical, materials) have low social popularity, while popular majors (computer, electrical, electronic information) have limited enrollment slots, leading to stable overall application attractiveness. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly shift backward from 2025, estimated at about 43004, with a range of 42504–43504.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 43004, range 42504–43504. Candidates with rankings at or below the lower limit (42504) can focus on Tier 1 majors (Computer, Electrical, Law, Electronic Information Class); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 43000) are advised to primarily choose Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Vehicle Engineering, Automation Class, Mathematics Class), while also considering Chang'an University's flagship transportation majors; candidates with rankings near or above the upper limit (43504) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Civil Engineering Class, Materials Class, Water Resources Class, Safety Engineering), while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements.
